title: Hands On With Linux
description: AWS Community Hero Nilesh Vaghela and his team hosted an engaging workshop titled "Hands-On With Linux." The workshop aimed to introduce students to the industry's extensive use of Linux, offering practical insights and hands-on experience. Attendees gained valuable knowledge about Linux's relevance in various industries, highlighting its importance in the tech ecosystem. This event exemplified AWS's commitment to empowering the next generation of tech enthusiasts with valuable skills and knowledge.

title: Womens' Day Celebration
description: On 10th March 2022, Women's Day was celebrated vibrantly with the AWS Cloud Club at Charotar University, honoring the achievements and contributions of women in technology. The event featured insightful discussions, inspiring talks, and empowering activities, fostering a supportive community for women in the field.

title: Getting Started With DevOps
description: The "Getting Started With DevOps" series kicked off with an introduction to serverless computing. This was followed by sessions on February 19, 2022, covering the basics of CloudFormation, focusing on the fundamentals of DevOps. These sessions provided attendees with a comprehensive understanding of key concepts and practices in modern cloud computing and software development methodologies.

title: ML Bootcamp
description: ASC conducted a 7-day long Machine Learning Bootcamp in collaboration with Microsoft Learn. The bootcamp provided participants with a deep dive into machine learning concepts and practical applications, enhancing their skills and knowledge in this rapidly evolving field.

title: October-Series
description: The October-Series in 2020 was a three-day event featuring informative sessions on Amazon App Stream, Security Cost Pillar, and Docker on AWS. Held from October 15 to 17, attendees gained valuable insights into these topics, deepening their understanding of AWS technologies and their practical applications.

title: ASC Webinar
description: Recalling the ASC Webinar held on Wednesday, April 15, 2020, featuring Sandip Patel, an AWS Academy Accredited Instructor.

title: Cloud-a-Thon
description: The Cloud-a-Thon event at Charotar University on March 28th, 2020, brought together enthusiasts for a day of innovation and hands-on learning in cloud technology.

title: AWSome Day
description: AWS hosted an AWSome Day, a free, one-day event led by AWS technical instructors. The event was tailored for technical leaders, IT professionals, and developers interested in gaining introductory training and insights into AWS products and cloud computing. Attendees had the opportunity to learn directly from experts and enhance their understanding of AWS technologies.

title: AWS CI/CD: From Code to Production
description: The AWS community was enriched by a hands-on introductory session led by Dr. Parth Shah, an AWS Community Builder. The session focused on the construction of Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, vital components in modern software development. Attendees gained practical insights into deploying code to production efficiently and effectively, reflecting AWS's commitment to empowering developers with cutting-edge tools and practices.

title: Infrastructure Camp Workshop
description: Embark on a transformative journey into the cloud with our hands-on AWS Infrastructure workshop! Perfect for both beginners and those with some cloud experience, this workshop is your gateway to mastering AWS services and deploying them with confidence.

title: CloudUP ON Her Celebrating Women's Day
description: This event is all about celebrating and empowering women in the field of cloud computing. Dive into a day filled with enlightening talks, engaging panel discussions, and exciting networking opportunities.

title: Cloud Security Essentials: AWS Networking & Beyond
description: The "Cloud Security Essentials: AWS Networking & Beyond" virtual event on April 6th, 2024, featuring Amit Arora, Senior Security Architect at AWS, provided deep insights into cloud security, AWS networking intricacies, and guidance for starting a career in cloud security. The session facilitated vibrant discussions on cybersecurity, allowed attendees to network with like-minded individuals, and offered the unique chance to engage in one-on-one conversations with an industry expert. This event served as an informative platform for delving into the dynamics of cloud security, aimed at enhancing knowledge and fostering community connections within the field. Stay connected for future opportunities and resources in cloud security.

title: AWS Cloud Bootcamp & Internship
description: The Internship covered CloudFront, LLM, Amazon Badrock, AWS Lambda, AWS API, AWS DynamoDB and Amazon EC2 enriching the experience of the student in Cloud Computing

title: Infrastructure as Code on AWS: A Hands-on Journey with Terraform
description: The AWS Club organized an online session on "Infrastructure as Code on AWS: A Hands-on Journey with Terraform." The session was delivered by AWS Community Builder Mr. SandipKumar Patel, who introduced participants to the fundamentals of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and demonstrated how Terraform can be used to efficiently provision and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS. Participants gained insights into core IaC concepts, practical Terraform usage, and best practices for managing cloud resources. The interactive session also included a live Q&A, allowing students to clarify their doubts and deepen their understanding of modern cloud infrastructure management.

title: The Golden Stack: Skills, Certs & Cloud Leadership
description: The AWS Club organized an event titled "The Golden Stack: Skills, Certs & Cloud Leadership" to guide students through the AWS Certification Journey and career opportunities in cloud computing. The event began with a technical session on "Emerging Trends in Cloud Computing – AI Integration with Cloud Platforms", followed by a Career Guidance Session focusing on building careers in Cloud and DevOps and pathways to global tech companies. A dedicated session for AWS Academy and cloud enthusiast students highlighted the AWS certification journey from beginner to Golden Jacket achiever, including hands-on workshops on SageMaker, Serverless, and Security, along with insights into AWS global events, hackathons, mentorship programs, learning portals, and Cloud Captain roles. The event concluded with an interactive Q&A and a valedictory session.
